title: Most API Strategies Will Break in the AI Era
description: Your APIs were designed for apps, not agents. Learn what changes when APIs become inputs to autonomous systems.

title: Your APIs Are Not Ready for AI Agents
description: Identity, access, contracts, and observability are not optional anymore. See how teams are fixing the gaps before they scale problems.

title: No Slides Without Consequences
description: Workshops, clinics, and labs where you bring your own API challenges. Get feedback from people actually running platforms.
